command: MT5='/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5' && echo '=== Fix XAUUSD in chart01.chr ===' && CHR="$MT5/MQL5/Profiles/Charts/Default/chart01.chr" && python3 -c "data=open('$CHR','rb').read(); data=data.replace(b'I\x00n\x00p\x00T\x00r\x00a\x00d\x00e\x00X\x00A\x00U\x00U\x00S\x00D\x00=\x00f\x00a\x00l\x00s\x00e\x00', b'I\x00n\x00p\x00T\x00r\x00a\x00d\x00e\x00X\x00A\x00U\x00U\x00S\x00D\x00=\x00t\x00r\x00u\x00e\x00\x00\x00'); open('$CHR','wb').write(data); print('Fixed XAUUSD=true')" 2>&1 && echo '=== Current MT5 status ===' && ps aux | grep terminal64 | grep -v grep && echo '=== Latest terminal log ===' && TLOG=$(ls -t "$MT5/logs/"*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$TLOG" ]; then echo "File: $TLOG"; tail -20 "$TLOG" | tr -d '\0'; else echo 'No terminal logs'; fi && echo '=== Latest EA log ===' && EALOG=$(ls -t "$MT5/MQL5/Logs/"*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$EALOG" ]; then echo "File: $EALOG"; tail -10 "$EALOG" | tr -d '\0'; else echo 'No EA logs'; fi && echo '=== Crontab ===' && crontab -l 2>/dev/null | head -10 && echo '=== Systemd timers ===' && systemctl list-timers --no-pager 2>/dev/null | head -10
